terms.definition_en: A composite building material made from a mixture of aggregate, cement, and water.
terms.definition_es: Un material de construcción compuesto hecho de una mezcla de agregados, cemento y agua.
examples: Reinforced concrete is used for the building foundation.
The concrete must cure for several days to reach its full strength.

terms.definition_en: The lower portion of a building structure that transfers its gravity loads to the earth.
terms.definition_es: La parte inferior de la estructura de un edificio que transfiere sus cargas de gravedad a la tierra.
examples: A deep foundation is required due to the soft soil conditions.
The foundation supports the entire weight of the skyscraper.

terms.definition_en: A binder, a substance used for construction that sets, hardens, and adheres to other materials.
terms.definition_es: Un aglomerante, una sustancia utilizada para la construcción que fragua, se endurece y se adhiere a otros materiales.
examples: Portland cement is the most common type of cement in general usage.
Mix the cement with water to create a paste.

terms.definition_en: The study of the forms and features of land surfaces, including their elevation and natural landmarks.
terms.definition_es: El estudio de las formas y características de las superficies terrestres, incluyendo su elevación y puntos de referencia naturales.
examples: A topography survey is needed before designing the road.
The topography of the site is very uneven.

terms.definition_en: A wall that is an active structural element of a building, bearing the weight of the elements above it.
terms.definition_es: Un muro que es un elemento estructural activo de un edificio, soportando el peso de los elementos sobre él.
examples: You cannot remove that load-bearing wall without compromising the structure.
The load-bearing walls distribute the roof's weight to the foundation.

categories.materials: Substances used for building and construction
categories.structures: Arrangement of and relations between the parts or elements of something complex
categories.surveying: Technique of determining the terrestrial or three-dimensional positions of points

inference_rules.description: If a user searches for a term, suggest all directly related terms
If a term has difficulty=beginner, prioritize showing it before intermediate ones
If two terms share the same category, they are contextually related
